title: Agentic workflow benchmark for reusable automation
why_it_matters: Reusable automation becomes valuable only when repeated workflows show measurable time savings and lower error rates.
actionable_opportunity: Create a benchmark for one repeated ChatGPT-to-GitHub workflow and compare it against the manual baseline.

oak_check.risk: Agentic automation can look powerful while hiding manual cleanup or unstable permissions.
oak_check.limit: Only repeated workflow measurements count as productivity evidence.
oak_check.falsification_route: Run the same workflow ten times and compare time saved, failure rate, and correction burden.
oak_check.m_minus_warning: Do not count automation as progress unless zero-touch friction is actually reduced.

sources.title: Daily Omega War Room demo context

next_action: Create an OAKBench issue for one repeated automation workflow.
business_funding_signal: Could become a reusable automation service or internal company operating primitive.
